name: Ghost Replay
description: Record your gameplay and race against your ghost! Supports multiple simultaneous ghosts.

auto-record.name: Auto Record
auto-record.description: Automatically record when entering a level

loop-ghosts.name: Loop Ghosts
loop-ghosts.description: Loop ghost playback when it ends

max-ghosts.name: Max Simultaneous Ghosts
max-ghosts.description: Maximum number of ghosts displayed at once
